Who We Are

Decades of
Trusted Logistics

Founded in 1990 in Uganda, KATRACO (U) LTD has built over three decades of proven experience delivering high-quality petroleum transport solutions to major oil marketers, fuel distributors, and industrial clients across East and Central Africa.


As part of MFK Logistics Holding Company, we benefit from a powerful network of affiliated companies — including Limoz Rwanda Ltd, Migera Trading Ltd, Gorilland Safaris Ltd, and Goritech Ltd — providing expanded operational resources and regional reach.

Head Office

Kampala, Uganda

Plot 190, Sixth Street, Industrial Area

P.O. Box 12569 Kampala

TIN

1000058719

Our Vision
To be the preferred petroleum logistics partner in East and Central Africa by delivering world-class transport solutions built on safety, reliability, and operational excellence.
Our Mission
To provide safe, timely, and efficient petroleum transportation services through modern fleet solutions, highly skilled personnel, and strict compliance with industry safety and environmental standards.
Core Values

What Drives Everything We Do

Safety First
Reliability
Professional Excellence
Integrity
Customer Commitment
What We Do

Specialized Petroleum Services

Comprehensive petroleum logistics solutions designed for oil marketing companies, fuel depots, industrial clients, and commercial distributors.

01
Diesel Transportation
Safe, efficient transportation of diesel fuel across domestic routes and regional corridors, ensuring timely delivery to depots and end-users.
02
Petrol Transportation
Certified transportation of petrol products with full compliance to petroleum handling safety standards and regulatory requirements.
03
Kerosene Transportation
Reliable kerosene transport solutions supporting industrial clients, commercial distributors, and households across the region.
04
Fuel Depot Replenishment
Scheduled and on-demand depot replenishment services ensuring uninterrupted fuel supply continuity for clients at all times.
05
Cross-Border Transportation
Seamless cross-border petroleum movement across Uganda, Rwanda, Kenya, Tanzania, South Sudan, and the DRC within the EAC framework.
06
Emergency Fuel Dispatch
Rapid response emergency fuel dispatch services to address urgent supply disruptions and critical operational needs for our clients.
Fleet Capacity

Built for Scale & Reliability

15
Direct Oil Tankers (Rwanda Subsidiary)
40
Additional Tankers (Limoz Rwanda Support)
47
Flatbed Trucks for Cargo Logistics
35
Additional Tankers Under Procurement

Our fleet infrastructure is maintained to the highest operational and safety standards, equipped with advanced systems ensuring reliability, regulatory compliance, and asset longevity.

GPS fleet tracking systems for real-time vehicle monitoring and route management
Preventive maintenance programs to maximize uptime and reduce operational disruptions
Certified safety systems ensuring driver, cargo, and road safety at all times
Compliance monitoring controls meeting all regulatory and operational requirements
